title: Gates of Grontessiant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:GatesOfGrontessiant.jpg|thumb|250px|Wat Tambor opens the Gates of Grontessiant.]]
The '''Gates of Grontessiant''' were a mythical alternate realm spoken of in the [[Book of the Boolmide]], the holy text of the [[Skakoan religion]].

==History==
It could only be opened when the [[Elders (Skakoan)|Elders]] read the ''Book'' on the [[Power Mounds of the Elders]] when the chosen individual was present. The Gates were the key to the mythical [[Eye of the Albino Cyclops]].

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Gates opened for [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]], permitting him to enter into the [[Threshold of the Hidden Realms]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Wat Tambor and the Quest for the Sacred Eye of the Albino Cyclops|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}
